rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0001
rows.name:
I think you heard, but a large
Growth force is approaching NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0002
rows.name:
It would be good if Director General Maurice's
talks bear fruit, but there is little hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0003
rows.name:
They treat Earthlings like
sworn enemies, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're assigned to defend the
entrance to the BLADE Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0005
rows.name: It's the most critical point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0006
rows.name: If HQ falls, we have no chance at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0007
rows.name:
That also means Growth's attack
will likely be fiercest here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0008
rows.name:
So that means they're counting
on us that much, right...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0009
rows.name: Where are Iriina-san and Doug-san assigned?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Iriina's at the entrance
to the Industrial Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Doug is on standby as reserve until
the enemy's main force is confirmed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0012
rows.name: Lao is assigned to guard the hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0013
rows.name: Tatsu will handle supplies, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0014
rows.name:
I will mobilize every bit of Nopon
willpower, pride, and connections, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0015
rows.name: Thanks, Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0016
rows.name:
When this battle is over, I'll cook
you into something delicious, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0017
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo-mo~! Tatsu is not an ingredient, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0018
rows.name: I'm counting on you too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0018_m
rows.name: I'm counting on you too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0018_f
rows.name: I'm counting on you too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_JNK0010
rows.name: Confident

rows.label: xs08050100_SEL0011
rows.name: Proudly say you're strong enough even on your own.

rows.label: xs08050100_JNK0020
rows.name: Hesitant

rows.label: xs08050100_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her you're actually a little scared.

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Do not put too much pressure on yourself.
Pressure only breeds impatience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0020
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0021
rows.name:
We're a team, after all. Let's all
work together and do our best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0022
rows.name: Honestly, me too[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0023
rows.name: Anyone would be scared in a battle this big.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0024
rows.name: Elma-san too, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0025
rows.name: Of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hold on to that fear. Strength
begins with knowing fear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08050100_MSG0027
rows.name: Let's move out.[ST:wait ]
